name: polymarket_structural_scan
thesis: Scan Polymarket for mechanically verifiable structural inefficiencies, including negRisk package pricing and cross-market logical subset inconsistencies.
null_hypothesis: After executable orderbook depth, fees, gas, spread, and assumption verification, structural inefficiencies are absent, rare, or not safely executable.
private_evidence_policy: Raw market, token, orderbook, and candidate details stay outside public aegis under aegis-strategies/incubating/olympus43.
